meaning: n.小的斑点,褐斑,斑点vt.弄上斑点,弄成斑纹,沾上斑点
examples: The only signs of ageing are the flecks of grey that speckle his dark hair.
The phosphorylated SR protein moves into the nucleus then relocates to a nuclear speckle.
The speckle is a scattering of light caused by micron-sized ridges and groves on an object’s surface.
Flood warnings and watches speckle the weather map from Michigan to southern Louisiana.
